<doctag><picture><loc_35><loc_34><loc_63><loc_45><logo></picture>
<section_header_level_1><loc_35><loc_60><loc_124><loc_67>2.2.11 A_B_SIDE</section_header_level_1>
<text><loc_83><loc_69><loc_458><loc_82>This output pin provides the cable orientation. It is used to establish USB SuperSpeed signal routing. This signal is not required in case of USB 2.0 support.</text>
<otsl><loc_83><loc_102><loc_464><loc_131><fcel>Value<fcel>Description<nl><fcel>HiZ<fcel>CC1 pin is attached to CC line<nl><fcel>0<fcel>CC2 pin is attached to CC line<nl><caption><loc_220><loc_92><loc_327><loc_98>Table 7. USB data MUX select</caption></otsl>
<section_header_level_1><loc_35><loc_140><loc_153><loc_147>2.2.12 VBUS_VS_DISCH</section_header_level_1>
<text><loc_83><loc_149><loc_458><loc_162>This input pin is used to sense V$_{BUS}$ presence, monitor V$_{BUS}$ voltage, and discharge V$_{BUS}$ from the USB Type-C receptacle side.</text>
<text><loc_83><loc_165><loc_440><loc_177>A serial resistor connected to the pin must be used to limit the discharge current through the pin. Maximum discharge current is 50 mA.</text>
<text><loc_83><loc_179><loc_462><loc_191>The discharge is activated automatically during cable disconnection, transition to a lower PDO voltage, hard reset and error recovery state. The discharge time is programmable by NVM (see Section 5 Start-up configuration).</text>
<section_header_level_1><loc_35><loc_199><loc_127><loc_206>2.2.13 VREG_1V2</section_header_level_1>
<text><loc_83><loc_208><loc_436><loc_221>This pin is used only for external decoupling of the 1.2 V internal regulator. The recommended decoupling capacitor is: 1 µF typ. (0.5 µF min., 10 µF max.)</text>
<section_header_level_1><loc_35><loc_230><loc_106><loc_237>2.2.14 VSYS</section_header_level_1>
<text><loc_83><loc_239><loc_455><loc_258>This is the low power supply from the system, if there is any. It can be connected directly to a single cell Lithium battery or to the system power supply delivering 3.3 V or 5 V. It is recommended to connect the pin to ground when it is not used.</text>
<section_header_level_1><loc_35><loc_266><loc_127><loc_273>2.2.15 VREG_2V7</section_header_level_1>
<text><loc_83><loc_275><loc_436><loc_288>This pin is used only for external decoupling of the 2.7 V internal regulator. The recommended decoupling capacitor is: 1 µF typ. (0.5 µF min., 10 µF max.)</text>
<section_header_level_1><loc_35><loc_296><loc_101><loc_303>2.2.16 VDD</section_header_level_1>
<text><loc_83><loc_305><loc_364><loc_311>This is the power supply from the USB power line for applications powered by V$_{BUS}$.</text>
<page_footer><loc_35><loc_488><loc_81><loc_492>DS12499 - Rev 8</page_footer>
<page_footer><loc_437><loc_488><loc_464><loc_492>page 9/42</page_footer>
<page_header><loc_407><loc_33><loc_464><loc_41>STUSB4500</page_header>

</doctag>
